title: pleopeltis latifolia
intro: Pleopeltis latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis latifolia include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Pleopeltis latifolia are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
